MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P. Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: Helen A. Sorep-Matley. The matter was reassigned to Pro Tem Judge, Stuart Bronstein in Dept.620.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-24-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly scheduled calendar for hearing on this date. Present: Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:J. Stokes, Reporter:P.Dowling. All parties present except plaintiff. Defendant Collie Middlebrooks appeared in pro per. Case taken off settlement conference calendar and off the trial calendar.
